key_r_a1_notes: D1 (MSS Status): 1=hoch (high status), 4=sehr_niedrig (lowest) — INVERSE numeric direction from 2018 thesis status_summe
D2 (MSS Dynamik): 1=positiv, 2=stabil, 3=negativ (mapped from WFS {1,3,5}; 1=positiv = improving = less at-risk)
indexind *_dynamik indicators: positive value = worsening — INVERSE polarity to MSS Dynamik class
transferbezug null in 2019/2021 specifically (suspended); non-null in 2015/2017 and 2023+
alleinerziehende present all editions 2015+ (not 2023+ only as ADR-0006 assumed)
C5 OSM completeness correction MUST be applied to D3 before the lead-lag test (geo-DS condition)
D4 must enter as cross-sectional baseline covariate not contemporaneous predictor (endogeneity risk)
Ordinal-appropriate methods for D1 MSS Status-Index (never metric-average class codes)
LOR vintage break: restrict lead-lag within-vintage or use seed_lor_crosswalk_2006_to_2021.csv
Uninhabited PLRs (gesamtindex IS NULL) excluded from all regression/calibration
